positive: A highly detailed, minimalist celestial tapestry design featuring a stylized crescent moon intertwined with geometric nebulae and glowing, cosmic flora. The composition is perfectly centered and symmetrical, creating a strong focal point. Use a neo-tribal and vaporwave aesthetic, emphasizing deep indigo blues, metallic gold foil accents, and soft lavender gradients. The artwork must maintain clean, thick silhouettes and crisp linework suitable for screen printing on apparel. High contrast, illuminated by a soft, ethereal glow that defines the edges of the main elements. Vector art style, intricate detailing, symmetrical mandala influence.
negative: blurry, low resolution, poor anatomy, extra limbs, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, noise, jpeg artifacts, gradients gradients, photorealism, complex backgrounds, dirty edges
